items.role: Local member profile and persona entitlement
items.interfaces: GET /identity/validate; POST /auth/login; Account Merge; BMS orchestration
items.impact: Persona and account lifecycle become unreliable.
items.openItems: Profile overwrite policy, deletion orchestration, BMS mutation rules

items.role: Member lookup, non-blocking login refresh, cleanup consumer
items.impact: Persona freshness may degrade; cleanup/compliance risk.
items.openItems: Endpoint/payload, timeout, previous-permission source, audit, PII

items.role: Workplace, parking, visitor, elevator, turnstile, traffic authority
items.interfaces: Entitlements, floors, parking, visitor, QR validation, hardware
items.impact: Access, parking, visitor, elevator, turnstile can fail.
items.openItems: Split service owners, SLAs, error catalog, hardware readiness

items.interfaces: Email/phone lookup, BZB member ID, linkage sync
items.impact: Retail persona merge may fail or mislink.
items.openItems: Duplicate handling, wrong-merge correction, deferrable behavior
Callback security, idempotency, reconciliation, refund process

items.interfaces: User view, visitor visibility, notification audience, car park config
items.impact: Operational support and data isolation gaps.
items.openItems: Seed admin scope, RBAC/org filtering, compensating controls
Schema, producer/consumer SLA, retry, DLQ, replay

items.impact: Wrong audience or stale tokens after delete.
Authorized access may fail at site.
items.openItems: Hardware test environment, floor mapping, timeout/fallback

items.interfaces: QR scan and online FS validation
items.openItems: Outage policy, latency threshold, audit retention
API owner, sample data, image retention, confidence thresholds
